rationale: Educ. Code §25.003 governs tuition for children from other states in residential facilities. It has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value limits.
quote: a school district shall charge tuition for a child who resides at a residential facility and whose maintenance expenses are paid in whole or in part by another state or the United States.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this tuition provision.
